default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential expansion of backlink services and partnership opportunities between growthx.ai and Awais Anees' team.](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Awais' team currently provides backlinks from moderate-quality sites; Jason seeks to increase quantity and quality (DR 50+, or 40+ if needed)](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Backlinks are acquired through daily email outreach to websites meeting specific criteria (e.g., AS30+, 10K+ traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Workflow involves a shared spreadsheet with tabs for approvals, price requests, and live links; Jason to review and approve new sites](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

## Topics

### Current Backlink Service Overview

  - [Awais' team conducts daily email outreach to acquire backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Existing requirements: AS30+, 10K+ traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current process involves Jason/team approving sites in a shared spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [SEMrush metrics are used for domain rating (DR) evaluation](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Expanding Backlink Quantity and Quality

  - [Jason requested increase in number of websites and higher quality backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [New target: Domain Rating (DR) 50+ from Ahrefs (adjusted to 30+ SEMrush equivalent)](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Awais to add 100+ new website options to the "Price Request" tab for approval](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Focus on scaling while maintaining or improving link quality](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### Workflow and Spreadsheet Management

  - [Multiple tabs in shared spreadsheet: "All Website suggestion", "Price Request", "Live Link"](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Approval process: Jason to move approved sites from "Price Request" to first tab](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - ["Live Link" tab shows pending articles (2 per project) awaiting payment](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

### Ongoing Projects and Pace

  - [SmithAI project in progress; normal pace of 2-3 articles per week preferred](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [7 websites pending article publication in "Website suggestion" tab](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Awais can accelerate to 50 articles in 2-3 days if needed for urgent projects](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)

### Partnership Exploration

  - [Brief mention of growthx.ai's AI and marketing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Potential for expanded collaboration, leveraging growthx.ai's technology](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to review and approve new website options (DR 50+/30+ SEMrush) in "Price Request" tab](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Confirm desired backlinks for pending projects (due to staff changes)](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Jason to arrange payment for pending articles in "Live Link" tab](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Maintain communication via Slack and Upwork for ongoing work and approvals](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [Awais to continue adding high-quality website options to the spreadsheet](https://fathom.video/share/6hHi4GX4XhHv4Ziwk2f5p-VURtd8seaP?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

action_items.description: Review/approve new websites in spreadsheet (Price Request tab, DR 30+ SEMrush)
Add websites w/ DR 50+ SEMrush (or 40+ if not enough) to Price Request tab
Set up payment for pending articles (Live Link tab)
Confirm w/ team if companies still want pending links (Live Link tab)
Check w/ team re: publishing articles on last 7 websites (Website suggestion tab)
